director.title: Director
director.subtitle: Sets the brief · Creative authority · Final approval

producer.title: Producer
producer.subtitle: Follows playbooks · Orchestrates specialists · Assembles campaign

specialists.title: Landing Page Specialist
specialists.subtitle: Full landing page assembly with SEO optimization
specialists.definitionOfDone: Landing page with hero section, SEO-optimized copy, product photography, CTA banners, and brand-compliant imagery. Translated, QA'd, and published.

specialists.title: Newsletter Specialist
specialists.subtitle: End-to-end newsletter production
specialists.definitionOfDone: Newsletter with approved editorial content, graded imagery, translated for all target markets, and distributed via channel publisher.

specialists.title: Social Campaign Specialist
specialists.subtitle: Multi-platform social media campaigns
specialists.definitionOfDone: Social campaign with platform-specific copy, visuals, and banners across META, LinkedIn, and other channels. QA'd and published.

specialists.title: Email Specialist
specialists.subtitle: Targeted email campaign production
specialists.definitionOfDone: Email with personalized copy, graded imagery, brand-compliant design, translated and ready for distribution.

specialists.title: Banner/Display Specialist
specialists.subtitle: Display advertising production
specialists.definitionOfDone: Banner set across all required IAB sizes, brand-compliant, QA'd for each platform, and published to Bannerflow.

specialists.title: Article/SEO Specialist
specialists.subtitle: SEO-optimized editorial content
specialists.definitionOfDone: Article with researched content, SEO-optimized structure, quality imagery, FAQ summary, and published to CMS.

specialists.title: Paid Search Specialist
specialists.subtitle: Google Ads & paid search campaigns
specialists.definitionOfDone: Ad groups with headline/description variants, audience targeting, keyword strategy, QA'd copy, and published to Google Ads.

specialists.title: Video Campaign Specialist
specialists.subtitle: Video content production & localization
specialists.definitionOfDone: Video assets produced, QA'd, localized with subtitles/voiceover, and published across video platforms.

specialists.title: Product Facts Specialist
specialists.subtitle: Product data sheets & fact content
specialists.definitionOfDone: Product fact sheets with researched specs, QA'd copy, translated for target markets, and published.

specialists.title: LinkedIn Specialist
specialists.subtitle: LinkedIn-specific content & campaigns
specialists.definitionOfDone: LinkedIn posts and articles with professional copy, imagery, repurposed from master content, QA'd and published.

specialists.title: Proofing Specialist
specialists.subtitle: Screen-captures vendor assets in live channels to document campaign activity
specialists.definitionOfDone: Timestamped screen captures of all vendor campaign assets across online channels, compiled into a proof-of-activity report ready for claiming.

specialists.title: Claiming Specialist
specialists.subtitle: Claims vendor marketing funds based on proofing documentation
specialists.definitionOfDone: Vendor claim submitted with proof-of-activity documentation, matching campaign spend to vendor agreements, ready for reimbursement.

toolbox.title: Translations
toolbox.subtitle: MAATS — Multi-Agent Automated Translation System
toolbox.description: 13-agent translation system based on MQM evaluation framework. Specialized dimension agents assess the translation in parallel, then Synthesis combines scores. The Editor (S1) produces a holistic verdict and the Rewriter (S2) generates alternatives until the QA Gate passes. Shares Grammar & Spelling (S13), Brand Voice (S11), Format Validation (S6), Audience (S7), Legal (S12), Synthesis (S3), and QA Gate (S8) with the QA tools. Win rate: 62.1% vs 30.1% for single-agent (NYU study).

subAgents.title: Translator
subAgents.description: Core translation engine using LLM + RAG + Translation Memory. Produces the initial translation from source to target language.

subAgents.title: Accuracy Assessment Agent
subAgents.description: Prevents meaning drift. Catches mistranslations, omissions, additions, and false friends by comparing source and target semantics.

subAgents.title: Terminology Assessment Agent
subAgents.description: Ensures correct use of product terms and branded terminology. Validates against Product & Offer glossary and Brand Identity terminology.

subAgents.title: Grammar & Spelling Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S13). Maps to MQM Linguistic Conventions dimension. Validates grammar, fluency, spelling, and language-specific rules per market profile and locale.

subAgents.title: Brand Voice Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S11). Maps to MQM Style dimension. Validates tone of voice and brand voice consistency against Brand Identity approved examples and Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Audience Appropriateness Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S7). Ensures the tone is appropriate for the target demographic. Flags culturally insensitive or unnatural expressions using Market Intelligence.

subAgents.title: Legal & Compliance Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S12). Validates legal disclaimers, GDPR compliance, and market-specific regulatory requirements from Guardrails.

subAgents.title: Locale Conventions Agent
subAgents.description: Verifies date, time, currency, and measurement formats per market profile. Ensures locale-specific conventions are correctly applied.

subAgents.title: Format Validation Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S6). Maps to MQM Design & Markup dimension. Validates formatting integrity — character limits, HTML/tag rules, UI elements, and channel-specific markup from Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Synthesis Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S3). Combines all assessment dimension scores into a single weighted quality assessment.

subAgents.title: Editor Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S1). Synthesizes reports from all dimension agents into a holistic editorial verdict. Prioritizes errors by severity and applies customizable dimension weighting.

subAgents.title: Rewriter Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S2). Generates three alternative translations to address identified errors. The Decision Agent selects or merges the best elements to produce the optimal localized version.

subAgents.title: QA Gate Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S8). Final pass/fail gate — loops back to the Editor if quality threshold is not met.

localization: Approved brand name translations — per market
Previously approved campaign translations — per market

toolbox.title: Analyze Customer Feedback
toolbox.subtitle: Sentiment, topics & trend analysis
toolbox.description: 4-agent feedback analysis system. Performs sentiment analysis, topic clustering, trend identification, and insight extraction.

subAgents.title: Sentiment Analysis Agent
subAgents.description: Analyzes customer sentiment across feedback sources.

subAgents.title: Topic Clustering Agent
subAgents.description: Clusters feedback by topic using Product & Offer category taxonomy.

subAgents.title: Trend Identification Agent
subAgents.description: Identifies trends using Performance historical data for comparison.

subAgents.title: Insight Extraction Agent
subAgents.description: Combines outputs from all feedback agents with Market Intelligence to extract actionable insights.

toolbox.title: Brand Compliance QA
toolbox.subtitle: Cross-asset brand & legal compliance
toolbox.description: 6-agent brand compliance system. Checks visual identity, tone, legal disclaimers, GDPR, and competitive claims.

subAgents.title: Visual Identity Agent
subAgents.description: Validates logo, color, and typography rules from Brand Identity.

subAgents.title: Brand Voice Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S11). Checks voice guide and approved examples from Brand Identity.

subAgents.title: Legal & Compliance Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S12). Validates legal disclaimers, GDPR rules, and privacy requirements from Guardrails.

subAgents.title: Competitive Claims Agent
subAgents.description: Validates competitor policy and claim rules from Guardrails and Market Intelligence.

subAgents.title: Synthesis Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S3). Combines all brand compliance outputs.

subAgents.title: QA Gate Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S8). Final pass/fail gate for brand compliance.

toolbox.title: Brief Engine
toolbox.subtitle: Variant-driven brief generation
toolbox.description: 3-agent brief system. Generates campaign, newsletter, or content briefs from Templates, Market Intelligence, and Performance data. Template-driven — one engine, multiple brief types.

subAgents.title: Campaign Brief Agent
subAgents.description: Generates structured campaign briefs with objectives, audiences, and channel mix from Market Intelligence and Performance.

subAgents.title: Newsletter Brief Agent
subAgents.description: Plans newsletter structure, editorial angles, and content slots using Brand Identity and Templates.

subAgents.title: Content Brief Agent
subAgents.description: Creates content strategy briefs with SEO angles, topic clusters, and format recommendations.

toolbox.title: Channel Screenshotter
toolbox.subtitle: Captures timestamped screenshots of live campaign assets across vendor channels
toolbox.description: Automated screen-capture agent that crawls vendor online channels (e-commerce, social, display, search) and takes timestamped screenshots of active campaign placements. Outputs include full-page captures, cropped asset views, and metadata (URL, timestamp, placement position, vendor name).

subAgents.title: URL Crawler
subAgents.subtitle: Discovers campaign placement URLs across vendor channels

subAgents.title: Screenshot Engine
subAgents.subtitle: Takes full-page and cropped screenshots with timestamps

subAgents.title: Metadata Tagger
subAgents.subtitle: Tags captures with URL, timestamp, vendor, placement, and campaign ID

toolbox.title: Claim Builder
toolbox.subtitle: Generates vendor reimbursement claims from proof reports
toolbox.description: Takes proof-of-activity reports and vendor agreements to generate structured claim documents. Calculates claimable amounts, maps spend to agreement line items, and produces submission-ready claim packages.

subAgents.title: Agreement Parser
subAgents.subtitle: Extracts claimable line items and rules from vendor agreements

subAgents.title: Spend Mapper
subAgents.subtitle: Maps campaign spend to agreement line items and calculates claimable amounts

subAgents.title: Claim Formatter
subAgents.subtitle: Produces submission-ready claim documents per vendor format

subAgents.title: Claim Tracker
subAgents.subtitle: Tracks claim status, deadlines, and reimbursement progress

toolbox.title: Copy Generator
toolbox.subtitle: Context-driven multi-channel copy creation
toolbox.description: 8-agent copy generation system. Creates net new copy for any channel from a brief. Channel Parameters and Brand Identity drive tone, format, and specs — one tool, many outputs.

subAgents.title: Orchestrator Agent
subAgents.description: Routes briefs to the right channel agent based on Campaign Brief and Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Email Copy Agent
subAgents.description: Produces email marketing copy using Channel Parameters and email Templates.

subAgents.title: Web / Landing Page Copy Agent
subAgents.description: Produces landing page and site copy using web Channel Parameters, SEO context, and Templates.

subAgents.title: Social Copy Agent
subAgents.description: Produces platform-specific social media copy per META, LinkedIn, and other channel specs.

subAgents.title: Ads Copy Agent
subAgents.description: Produces search and display ad copy per Google Ads, programmatic, and banner Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Article / Editorial Copy Agent
subAgents.description: Produces long-form editorial, article, and guide content using Brand Identity tone and Templates.

subAgents.title: Banner Copy Agent
subAgents.description: Produces display banner headlines and CTAs per IAB specs and Bannerflow Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Copy QA Agent
subAgents.description: Calls Copy QA internally to score all channel outputs across 5 quality dimensions. Triggers the Editor (S1) and Rewriter (S2) loop until quality threshold is met.

toolbox.title: Copy QA
toolbox.subtitle: Multi-dimensional copy quality assurance
toolbox.description: 6-agent copy quality system. Checks grammar, brand voice, factual accuracy, tone, and legal compliance, then Synthesis combines scores. The tool's built-in editorial engine (S1) produces a verdict and rewrites (S2) until the QA Gate passes.

subAgents.title: Grammar & Spelling Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S13). Maps to MQM Linguistic Conventions dimension. Validates grammar, fluency, spelling, and language-specific rules per market profile and locale.

subAgents.title: Brand Voice Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S11). Checks tone of voice against Brand Identity approved examples.

subAgents.title: Factual Accuracy Agent
subAgents.description: Validates product specs, pricing, and claims against Product & Offer data.

subAgents.title: Audience Appropriateness Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S7). Checks audience appropriateness using Market Intelligence buyer personas and Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Legal & Compliance Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S12). Validates disclaimers, GDPR compliance, and competitor mention rules from Guardrails.

subAgents.title: Synthesis Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S3). Combines all copy quality scores into a single weighted assessment.

subAgents.title: QA Gate Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S8). Final pass/fail gate — loops back to Editor if threshold not met.

toolbox.title: Copy Repurposing
toolbox.subtitle: Channel-specific copy adaptation
toolbox.description: 6-agent copy repurposing system. Rewrites master copy for LinkedIn, Meta, banner, email, and Google Ads, with QA verification.

subAgents.title: LinkedIn Rewrite Agent
subAgents.description: Adapts copy for LinkedIn format and tone using Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Meta/Facebook Rewrite Agent
subAgents.description: Adapts copy for Meta platforms using Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Banner Headline Rewrite Agent
subAgents.description: Adapts copy for banner headline constraints using Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Email Rewrite Agent
subAgents.description: Adapts copy for email format using Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Google Ads Rewrite Agent
subAgents.description: Adapts copy for Google Ads character limits using Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Copy QA Agent
subAgents.description: Calls Copy QA internally to score all repurposed outputs across 5 quality dimensions. Triggers the Editor (S1) and Rewriter (S2) loop until quality threshold is met.

toolbox.title: Image QA
toolbox.subtitle: Visual asset quality assurance
toolbox.description: 6-agent image quality system. Checks brand compliance, technical quality, accessibility, audience fit, channel formats, and synthesizes pass/fail.

subAgents.title: Brand Compliance Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S4). Checks assets against visual identity rules — logo, colors, typography.

subAgents.title: Technical Quality Agent
subAgents.description: Validates resolution, dimensions, and technical specs from Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Accessibility Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S5). Checks WCAG compliance, contrast ratios, and alt text readiness.

subAgents.title: Audience Appropriateness Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S7). Checks cultural fit and sensitivity for target market.

subAgents.title: Format Validation Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S6). Validates asset dimensions, file size, and format specs per platform.

subAgents.title: Synthesis Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S3). Combines quality check results into a pass/fail assessment.

subAgents.title: QA Gate Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S8). Final pass/fail gate — determines if asset meets quality threshold.

toolbox.title: Master Production — Image
toolbox.subtitle: AI image generation & adaptation
toolbox.description: 5-agent image production system. Generates product photography and creative images, assesses quality via Image QA, refines based on feedback, and adapts formats per channel.

subAgents.title: Product Photography Agent
subAgents.description: Generates AI product photography based on Brand Identity visual style and Product & Offer catalog data.

subAgents.title: Image Generation Agent
subAgents.description: Generates images based on Brand Identity visual style and Product & Offer data.

subAgents.title: Image Assessment Agent
subAgents.description: Runs Image QA for quality verification on generated images.

subAgents.title: Refinement Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S9). Iterates on generated assets based on assessment feedback.

subAgents.title: Format Adaptation Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S10). Resizes, crops, or reformats assets for different channels.

toolbox.title: Master Production — Video
toolbox.subtitle: AI video generation & adaptation
toolbox.description: 4-agent video production system. Generates videos, assesses quality via Video QA, refines, and adapts formats per platform.

subAgents.title: Video Generation Agent
subAgents.description: Generates video content based on Brand Identity motion guidelines and Templates.

subAgents.title: Video Assessment Agent
subAgents.description: Runs Video QA for quality verification on generated video.

subAgents.title: Refinement Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S9). Iterates on video assets based on assessment feedback.

subAgents.title: Format Adaptation Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S10). Reformats video for different platform specs.

toolbox.title: Proof Report Generator
toolbox.subtitle: Compiles screenshots and metadata into proof-of-activity reports
toolbox.description: Assembles screen captures, timestamps, and placement metadata into structured proof-of-activity reports per vendor agreement. Matches captured placements against agreed campaign specs to verify fulfillment.

subAgents.title: Evidence Compiler
subAgents.subtitle: Groups captures by vendor, campaign, and channel

subAgents.title: Fulfillment Matcher
subAgents.subtitle: Matches captured placements against vendor agreement requirements

toolbox.title: QA & Sign-off
toolbox.subtitle: Reviews & approves output
toolbox.description: Human-facing approval interface that orchestrates Copy QA, Image QA, Video QA, and Brand Compliance QA to present a unified quality assessment for human sign-off.

toolbox.title: Researcher
toolbox.subtitle: Multi-source research & intelligence agent
toolbox.description: 6-agent research system. Searches online sources, queries the company knowledge base, and analyzes provided materials (spec sheets, vendor documentation, articles, competitive reports) to produce structured research briefs. Supports both human-initiated deep dives and agent-triggered fact-checking.

subAgents.title: Web Research Agent
subAgents.description: Searches online sources — industry reports, news, competitor sites, social listening, and public databases. Returns structured findings with source attribution.

subAgents.title: Knowledge Base Agent
subAgents.description: Queries the company brain — brand guidelines, market intelligence, product specs, performance data, vendor agreements, and all internal knowledge domains. Cross-references across domains.

subAgents.title: Document Analysis Agent
subAgents.description: Ingests and analyzes provided materials — spec sheets, vendor catalogs, articles, whitepapers, competitive teardowns, and any uploaded documents. Extracts key data points and structures them.

subAgents.title: Data Analysis Agent
subAgents.description: Analyzes quantitative data — performance metrics, market sizing, pricing comparisons, trend analysis. Produces charts, tables, and statistical summaries.

subAgents.title: Synthesis Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S3). Combines findings from all research agents into a unified research brief with key insights, recommendations, and confidence scores.

subAgents.title: Fact-Check Agent
subAgents.description: Validates claims, statistics, and assertions against multiple sources. Flags unverified claims and assigns confidence levels. Used by other tools for inline verification.

toolbox.title: SEO & GEO Localizations
toolbox.subtitle: Agentic search optimization per market
toolbox.description: 6-agent system for market-specific SEO. Researches keywords, analyzes SERPs, adapts content, optimizes technical SEO, and handles local search patterns.

subAgents.title: Keyword Research Agent
subAgents.description: Identifies high-value keywords per locale using Market Intelligence and Product & Offer data.

subAgents.title: SERP Analysis Agent
subAgents.description: Analyzes search engine results pages for target keywords. Uses Performance historical ranking data.

subAgents.title: Content Adaptation Agent
subAgents.description: Adapts translated content with target keywords while maintaining Brand Identity.

subAgents.title: Technical SEO Agent
subAgents.description: Validates technical SEO elements — meta tags, structured data, site specs from Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Local Search Optimization Agent
subAgents.description: Optimizes for local search patterns per market using Market Intelligence.

subAgents.title: Synthesis/Recommendation Agent
subAgents.description: Combines outputs from all SEO agents into actionable recommendations.

toolbox.title: Video Localization
toolbox.subtitle: Video translation & cultural adaptation
toolbox.description: 4-agent system for localizing video content. Translates scripts via Translations tool, generates subtitles, adapts cultural references, and synchronizes timing. The tool's built-in editorial engine (S1) synthesizes outputs and rewrites (S2) until quality is met.

subAgents.title: Video Translator Agent
subAgents.description: Uses Translations tool for script translation in video context.

subAgents.title: Subtitle Generation Agent
subAgents.description: Generates subtitles from translated script, respecting Channel Parameters for format and timing.

subAgents.title: Cultural Adaptation Agent
subAgents.description: Adapts cultural references using Market Intelligence market profiles and Guardrails.

subAgents.title: Timing/Sync Agent
subAgents.description: Synchronizes subtitle timing with source video pacing.

toolbox.title: Video QA
toolbox.subtitle: Video asset quality assurance
toolbox.description: 7-agent video quality system. Checks audio, subtitles, brand compliance, pacing, accessibility, channel formats, and synthesizes.

subAgents.title: Audio Quality Agent
subAgents.description: Validates audio quality against Channel Parameters audio specs.

subAgents.title: Subtitle Accuracy Agent
subAgents.description: Checks subtitle accuracy against AI Translations output and source script.

subAgents.title: Brand Compliance Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S4). Checks visual identity and motion guidelines.

subAgents.title: Pacing & Format Agent
subAgents.description: Validates duration, aspect ratios, and pacing from Channel Parameters.

subAgents.title: Accessibility Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S5). Checks accessibility requirements from Guardrails.

subAgents.title: Format Validation Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S6). Validates per-platform video specs.

subAgents.title: Synthesis Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S3). Combines all video QA outputs into pass/fail.

subAgents.title: QA Gate Agent
subAgents.description: Shared sub-agent (S8). Final pass/fail gate — determines if asset meets quality threshold.

knowledge.title: Brand Identity
knowledge.subtitle: Brand guidelines, tone of voice, visual identity, photography style, co-branding rules — 10 items

knowledge.title: Market Intelligence
knowledge.subtitle: Buyer personas (SMB/Enterprise/Public), 6 market profiles, competitor intel, seasonal patterns — 13 items

knowledge.title: Product & Offer
knowledge.subtitle: Product catalog, pricing, vendor info, service offerings, cross-sell mappings — 9 items

knowledge.title: Guardrails
knowledge.subtitle: GDPR, legal disclaimers, accessibility, competitor policy, AI disclosure — 10 items

knowledge.title: Performance
knowledge.subtitle: Campaign history, channel benchmarks, A/B test results, attribution data — 7 items

knowledge.title: Templates
knowledge.subtitle: Email, landing page, banner, social, article, presentation, product fact sheet templates — 7 items

knowledge.title: Vendor Agreements
knowledge.subtitle: Vendor marketing fund agreements, claiming rules, deadlines, and reimbursement terms — 10 items

knowledge.title: Localization Knowledge
knowledge.subtitle: Translation memory, glossaries, and linguistic assets per market — 9 items
items: Approved brand name translations — per market
Previously approved campaign translations — per market

sharedAgents.title: Editor
sharedAgents.description: Built-in editorial engine shared across tools. Synthesizes assessment reports from all dimension agents, prioritizes and weighs errors by severity, and produces a holistic editorial verdict that drives the rewrite loop.

sharedAgents.title: Rewriter
sharedAgents.description: Built-in rewriting engine shared across tools. Produces improved alternatives based on the Editor verdict and generates multiple candidates for the quality loop to reassess.

sharedAgents.title: Synthesis
sharedAgents.description: Combines multi-dimensional quality scores into a single weighted assessment. Determines pass/fail against configurable thresholds.

sharedAgents.title: Brand Compliance
sharedAgents.description: Checks assets against visual identity rules — logo usage, color palette, typography, and co-branding guidelines from Brand Identity.

sharedAgents.title: Accessibility
sharedAgents.description: Validates WCAG compliance, contrast ratios, alt text readiness, and inclusive design requirements from Guardrails.

sharedAgents.title: Format Validation
sharedAgents.description: Maps to MQM Design & Markup dimension. Validates asset dimensions, file size, format specs, and UI element formatting per platform against Channel Parameters.

sharedAgents.title: Audience Appropriateness
sharedAgents.description: Ensures tone and content are appropriate for the target demographic. Flags culturally insensitive or unnatural expressions using Market Intelligence.

sharedAgents.title: QA Gate
sharedAgents.description: Internal quality gate that runs before tool output. Checks against quality threshold — if below, triggers the rewrite/refinement loop.

sharedAgents.title: Refinement
sharedAgents.description: Iterates on generated assets based on assessment feedback. Loops with the QA dimension agents until quality threshold is met.

sharedAgents.title: Format Adaptation
sharedAgents.description: Resizes, crops, or reformats assets for different channel specs. Produces multi-format output from a single master asset.

sharedAgents.title: Brand Voice
sharedAgents.description: Maps to MQM Style dimension. Validates tone of voice, brand voice guidelines, and approved examples against Brand Identity.

sharedAgents.title: Grammar & Spelling
sharedAgents.description: Maps to MQM Linguistic Conventions dimension. Validates grammar, fluency, spelling, punctuation, and language-specific rules per market profile and locale.

sharedAgents.title: Legal & Compliance
sharedAgents.description: Validates legal disclaimers, GDPR compliance, privacy rules, and competitor mention policies from Guardrails.
